allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(r['full_name'], r['html_url']\) for r in data.get\('items',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; [print\(f['name'], f['download_url']\) for f in json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(f,dict\)]")
Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json items = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for f in items: if isinstance\(f, dict\): print\(f['name'], f.get\('download_url',''\)\) ")
